description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:latest Docker image with the antespi/docker-imap-devel service and runs a global before_script of `python -V` and `locale` for every job. Define two stages, test and deploy, and set the listed environment variables for the IMAP and SMTP services. In the test stage add a `unittesting` job that executes `pip install -r requirements.txt`, `pip install -r dev-requirements.txt`, `coverage run setup.py test`, `coverage html`, and `coverage report`, always uploads untracked artifacts, and is excluded for scheduled pipelines. Also in the test stage add a `security` job that runs only on tag pipelines, installs `safety` via pip, then runs `safety check --cache -r requirements.txt -r dev-requirements.txt` and `safety check --bare`. In the deploy stage add a `pages` job that runs `python -V` and `mv coverage_html_report public`, publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and does not run on schedules. Finally, add a `pypi` job that runs only on tags, runs `python -V`, installs pandoc with `apt update && apt -y install pandoc`, installs `pypandoc pandoc` via pip, writes a `.pypirc` file with the PyPI repository URL and the `${PYPI_USER}` and `${PYPI_PASSWORD}` secrets, uploads the source distribution with `python setup.py check sdist upload -r pypi`, and then removes the `.pypirc` file.
